# Armaan Parvez

> Independent product designer crafting modern UI/UX for SaaS products, mobile apps, and marketing websites. Based in India, available worldwide.

Armaan Parvez is a freelance / independent product designer with 4+ years of experience and 45+ client collaborations. He focuses on translating ambiguous product ideas into clear, modern, opinionated interfaces — from landing pages to full SaaS dashboards to mobile apps.

## Hire / Contact

- Email: helloarmaanux@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/armaanux
- Status: Available for work (as of June 2026)
- Location: India · Remote-first · works with clients worldwide
- Typical engagement: 2–8 week sprints, fixed-scope or retainer

## Services

- Product design for SaaS dashboards and web apps
- Mobile app design (iOS and Android)
- Marketing websites & landing pages
- Design systems and UI component libraries
- Brand identity for digital-first products
- Prototyping and design-to-dev handoff
- UX audits and redesigns of existing products
- Founder / early-stage design partner

## How he works

- Collaborative, async-friendly, fast iteration
- Comfortable starting from rough briefs, sketches, or "we don't know yet"
- Ships in Figma; builds with developer handoff in mind
- Prefers small focused projects over large agency-style scope
- Will say no to projects that don't fit

## Tools

Figma, Framer, Webflow, Notion, Cursor, VS Code, Linear, Claude, Spline, Lottie, Principle, Photoshop, Illustrator, Notion, Creative Cloud, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google Analytics and more.

## Best for

- Pre-seed to Series B startups
- Solo founders shipping their first product
- Existing SaaS teams needing a design refresh or new feature surface
- Anyone who wants a designer who actually cares about the details

## What he is NOT

- Not an agency
- Not a logo-only / brand-only designer
- Not interested in template-style work
- Not available for unpaid spec work

## Case studies

- NutriFlow, Designing a Connected Nutrition Platform — https://armaanux.in/nutriflow.html
  A healthtech case study. Redesigned an unusable nutrition mobile app and designed a new nutritionist dashboard from scratch, into one connected platform across iOS, Android, and web. Scope covered mobile UX overhaul, dashboard 0 → 1, UX strategy, and a shared UI system. Features include three meal-logging paths (photo + AI, barcode, nutrition label), an 8-character code that links clients to nutritionists, biometric and mood tracking (ketones, glucose, mood, macros, 27 micronutrients), AI-assisted meal creation across multiple diet styles, and a future-safe visual system ready to evolve toward Apple Liquid Glass on iOS 26.

## Links

- Portfolio: https://armaanux.in
- Case study (NutriFlow, Connected Nutrition Platform): https://armaanux.in/nutriflow.html
